headline: Benefit Street Partners Closes Milestone CLO 50 With $500 Million
summary: NEW YORK, June 18, 2026--Benefit Street Partners L.L.C. ("BSP"), Franklin Templeton’s private credit specialist investment manager with $93 billion in assets under management, (1) today announced that BSP CLO 50, a $500 million new-issue collateralized loan obligation (CLO), closed on May 26, 2026. The transaction was arranged in partnership with Scotiabank.
